query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS records_to_delete,
  SUM(CAST(COALESCE(pt.amount, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS amount_to_delete
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND pt.external_id LIKE 'pay-%'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM payment_transactions pt_new
    WHERE pt_new.section = pt.section
      AND pt_new.contract_no = pt.contract_no
      AND pt_new.paid_at = pt.paid_at
      AND pt_new.amount = pt.amount
      AND pt_new.external_id NOT LIKE 'pay-%'
      AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt_new.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  )
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS records_to_delete,
  SUM(CAST(COALESCE(pt.amount, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS amount_to_delete
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND pt.external_id LIKE 'pay-%'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM payment_transactions pt_new
    WHERE pt_new.section = pt.section
      AND pt_new.contract_no = pt.contract_no
      AND pt_new.paid_at = pt.paid_at
      AND pt_new.amount = pt.amount
      AND pt_new.external_id NOT LIKE 'pay-%'
      AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt_new.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  )
